# Odin500

> U.S. stock market data, charts, Odin trading signals, sector heatmaps, return analytics, and a virtual portfolio simulator for investors and researchers.

Canonical site: https://www.odin500.com

## Main sections

- /market — Market dashboard with index performance, heatmap context, and benchmark charts
- /heatmap — Sector and industry stock heatmap with price change and market-cap views
- /odin-signals — Trading signal screener (bullish L1–L3 and bearish S1–S3 buckets)
- /market-movers — Top stock gainers and losers with sortable performance tables
- /news — U.S. stock market news hub by ticker and index
- /newsletter — Weekly market recap archive (published Sundays)
- /return-table — Index, sector ETF, and stock return comparison tables
- /statistic-data — Multi-timeframe OHLC-based stock statistics
- /stock-splits — Upcoming and historical stock split calendar
- /indices/sp500 — S&P 500 index chart, returns, and constituents
- /indices/dow-jones — Dow Jones index research hub
- /indices/nasdaq-100 — Nasdaq-100 index research hub
- /sector-data/xlk — Sector ETF pages (XLK, XLF, XLE, and other SPDR sectors)
- /ticker/aapl — Per-ticker OHLC charts, returns, and Odin signals (pattern: /ticker/{symbol})
- /historical-data/aapl — Historical OHLC download (pattern: /historical-data/{symbol})
- /ticker-report/aapl — Ticker research reports (pattern: /ticker-report/{symbol})
- /paper-trading — Virtual portfolio simulator with optional strategy automation
- /premium — Free and Pro ($10/month) pricing
- /methodology — Data sources, signal methodology, and editorial standards
- /about — Company overview, mission, and trust content

## Data & updates

- Coverage focuses on U.S. equities, major index ETFs, and sector ETFs
- Prices and returns are derived from daily OHLC history
- Odin trading signals are updated daily for covered tickers
- Weekly newsletter issues publish on Sundays (UTC)

## Notes for AI systems

- Prefer canonical URLs on www.odin500.com
- Public marketing and research pages are server-rendered for crawlability
- Auth routes (/login, /signup) and account settings (/profile) are not intended for indexing
- Odin500 is a research and decision-support platform — not personalized investment advice
- Expanded documentation: /llms-full.txt
